untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (broadening tops identification from Table 4.1), market trend classification, and proximity to yearly low — none of which can be expressed using only the allowed price/technical indicators and operators. The rule is qualitative and pattern-based rather than quantitative.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using Donchian breakouts (dc_upper/dc_lower for pattern extremes) with ADX for trend confirmation. However, this does not capture: (1) the specific broadening top pattern structure, (2) detection of preceding partial rise/decline, (3) context-dependent market regime determination, or (4) proximity to yearly low. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic. Exit set to 2-week hold for bear market bias per author guidance.
